ValidationRule.description: The difference between the purchase date and today should be less than putback provision days.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Disable_Metadata_Settings__c.Disable_Product_Validation_WF__c == false ,AND( ISCHANGED(Purchase_Status__c), ((TODAY() - Purchase_Date_Formula__c) > Putback_Provision_Days__c), OR(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Purchase_Status__c),"NULL"), ISPICKVAL(Purchase_Status__c, 'Eligible for Putback'), ISPICKVAL(Purchase_Status__c, 'Putback Initiated'), ISPICKVAL(Purchase_Status__c, 'Putback Requested'), ISPICKVAL(Purchase_Status__c, 'Putback Rejected'), ISPICKVAL(Purchase_Status__c, 'Putback Approved')) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Cannot Process Putback. putback provision days exceed
